ScenarioDef.label: Faulty Shape
ScenarioDef.description:
TEST
<color=#f5ffa2>Gameplay Effects:</color>
- <color=#8a8ae6>Shapeshifter</color> does not have access to archite <color=#8a8ae6>xenotypes</color>.
- All genes have 2 times <color=#8a8ae6>less complexity and archites</color>.
- All pawns will be considered to have the <color=#8a8ae6>bisexual</color> trait for <color=#8a8ae6>vanilla</color> checks.
<color=#f5ffa2>Leper start:</color>
- <color=#8a8ae6>Shapeshifters</color> will have a <color=#8a8ae6>limit</color> on the maximum number of genes. If they exceed this limit, they will lose <color=#8a8ae6>one random gene</color> each day.
- Each <color=#8a8ae6>monolith level</color> increases the limit by 1
- If the monolith is <color=#8a8ae6>embraced</color>, the limit will disappear.
- Every day 5 shapeshifter <color=#8a8ae6>genetic material</color> is obtained.
- Shapeshifter can implant <color=#8a8ae6>fleshmass geneline and hivemind geneline</color> genes.
<color=#f5ffa2>Ashen start:</color>
-
<color=#f5ffa2>Tips:</color>
- All pawns that have any of these genes are considered shapeshifters: <color=#8a8ae6>Shapeshifter, chimera, morpher, archiver, switcher</color>.
- The limit for endogenes is 35 genes (5 rows). The limit for xenogenes is sanguophage genset + 3.
- The limit for endogenes is 35 genes (5 rows). The limit for xenogenes is sanguophage genset + 3.
- <color=#8a8ae6>Geneline</color> genes require the <color=#8a8ae6>Chimera</color> gene.
<color=#999999>This scenario is a mini-mod that makes changes after it's launched. These changes are permanent for the session in which the scenario was launched.</color>
<color=#f5ffa2>Unimposed rules:</color>
- -
<color=#999999>All of the above conditions are not imposed by the scenario, and you are free to disregard them.</color>
<color=#f5ffa2>Difficulty:</color> TEST

scenario.summary: One shapeshifter with no supplies. <color=#ff9595>Veteran</color> scenario.
